title: Malicious Script That Gets Rid of ADS, (Wed, Apr 1st)

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - Malicious Script That Gets Rid of ADS, (Wed, Apr 1st)
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/04
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*dwm.cmd*'
            - '*isc.sans.edu*'
            - '*test.ext*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
